# Giuseppe Conticchio — Full Stack Developer

> Personal portfolio of Giuseppe Conticchio, Full Stack Developer with 4 years of experience in the Automotive sector.

## Identity

- **Name**: Giuseppe Conticchio
- **Role**: Full Stack Developer
- **Location**: Gravina in Puglia, Italy
- **Email**: peppeco98@gmail.com
- **Available**: Full remote / Hybrid

## Professional Summary

Full Stack Developer working at Macnil since 2021 in the IoT, Automotive and Fleet Management sector.
Main tech stack: Flutter, React, Java SpringBoot.
Strong communicator with a collaborative and proactive approach.
Goal: grow steadily in a stable company, taking on progressive responsibilities.

## Experience

- **2024 – Present** | Full Stack Developer @ Macnil — Flutter, Java Spring Boot. Mobile apps connected to Bluetooth devices integrated with Fleet Management platforms.
- **2021 – 2024** | WEB Developer @ Macnil — React, Node.js, Java Spring Boot, SQL, MongoDB, Cassandra. Development of GTFleet 365 web platform (IoT/Automotive/Fleet Management).
- **2018 – 2021** | Phone and PC Repairs — Software repair and hardware component replacement.
- **2016 – 2018** | E-commerce @ Bioland — Website management, product database, newsletter automation.

## Education

- **2018 – 2021** | Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science — University of Bari Aldo Moro (105/110)
- **2012 – 2018** | Technical High School Diploma in Computer Science — ITIS Galileo Galilei, Altamura (80/100)

## Technical Skills

**Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Dart, Python, HTML, CSS/SCSS, C
**Frameworks**: Flutter, React, Spring Boot, Node.js, Redux
**Databases**: MySQL, MongoDB, Cassandra, DynamoDB
**Tools**: Git, Docker, VS Code, Claude Code, Postman, Blender, Netlify

## Projects

- **Charging Stations Map** — Flutter, Google Maps API
- **Il Belvedere (B&B Website)** — HTML, CSS, React.js
- **House Price Prediction** — Python, Machine Learning (Daegu, South Korea dataset)
- **Opinion Target Extraction** — Python, NLP, Double Propagation
